description: Deterministic lookup table for non-Nature/Science journal quality signals. Runtime scoring should retrieve from this table only; it should not ask the LLM to interpret journal prestige or CCF rank.

ccf_a.description: CCF A-ranked journal in the packaged CCF catalog.

ccf_b.description: CCF B-ranked journal in the packaged CCF catalog.

ccf_c.description: CCF C-ranked journal in the packaged CCF catalog.

unknown.description: No deterministic journal-quality mapping is available.

family_tier_1.description: Tier-1 Nature/Science family journal in the dedicated source list.

family_tier_2.description: Tier-2 Nature/Science family journal in the dedicated source list.

family_tier_3.description: Tier-3 Nature family journal in the dedicated source list.

science_partner.description: Science Partner Journal in the dedicated Science source list.
